SEARCH
Package com.txstate.bloodhound.model

Class HealthRecord

java.lang.Object
com.txstate.bloodhound.model.HealthRecord
public class HealthRecord extends Object
Represents a single captured health session and its derived classifications.

A record stores raw metrics (blood pressure, heart rate, and lipid values), contextual tags (time of day and timing context), and calculated category labels assigned by the service layer.

    Unix timestamp in milliseconds indicating when the record was stored.

  • Constructor Details

    • HealthRecord

      public HealthRecord()
      Creates an empty record for JSON loading and incremental field population.

    • HealthRecord

      public HealthRecord(Integer systolic, Integer diastolic, Integer heartRate, Integer totalCholesterol, Integer ldl, Integer hdl, Integer triglycerides, String timeOfDay, String medTiming, String activityTiming)
      Creates a draft health record with metric and context values.
      Parameters:
      systolic - systolic blood pressure in mmHg
      diastolic - diastolic blood pressure in mmHg
      heartRate - heart rate in bpm
      totalCholesterol - total cholesterol in mg/dL
      ldl - LDL in mg/dL
      hdl - HDL in mg/dL
      triglycerides - triglycerides in mg/dL
      timeOfDay - time-of-day context label
      medTiming - medication timing context label
      activityTiming - activity timing context label

  • Method Details

    • hasAtLeastOneMetric

      public boolean hasAtLeastOneMetric()
      Indicates whether at least one quantitative metric is present.
      Returns:
      true when any metric field is non-null; otherwise false

    • getSessionId

      public String getSessionId()
      Returns the persisted session identifier.
      Returns:
      session identifier, or null before persistence
